overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in Western attire walking along a winding dirt trail through a lush mountain valley. The scene features green meadows, pine forests, rocky outcrops, and distant mountains under a partly cloudy sky, with a horse-drawn carriage passing by midway through the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain valley dirt trail with rocky outcrops

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along the dirt path through the open valley, heading toward the distant mountains

entered.detail: winding dirt path with visible wheel ruts cutting through the valley floor
distant mountain peaks with snow patches visible under the blue sky
dense evergreen coniferous trees covering the left hillside
steep rocky mountainside with exposed gray stone on the right
large gray rocks scattered across the grassy meadow
lush green grass with small white wildflowers

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a winding dirt trail through a wide-open mountain valley. The path is flanked by a pine forest on the left and rocky cliffs on the right, with distant mountains visible ahead. The scene is bathed in bright midday sunlight with scattered clouds overhead.

events.description: horse-drawn carriage enters from the right and overtakes the character on the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk along the trail as a horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right side

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with canvas cover moving along the trail, overtaking the character from the right

entered.detail: wooden wagon with beige canvas cover pulled by two horses and driven by a figure in dark clothing
rustic wooden fence line running parallel to the left side of the trail

segments.scene_description: As the character continues walking, a horse-drawn carriage enters from the right and passes by on the trail. The rocky cliff on the right gives way to grassy hillsides with dense bushes, while the pine forest on the left grows closer. A wooden fence line becomes visible along the left side of the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding dirt trail that transitions from an open mountain valley into a more enclosed, rural landscape. It begins with the character walking between a pine forest and towering rocky cliffs under the bright midday sun and scattered clouds. As the character progresses, the rocky terrain on the right gives way to rolling grassy hillsides and dense bushes. The scene then shifts as a horse-drawn carriage enters from the right to pass by, while the pine forest on the left draws closer and a wooden fence line emerges along the path.
